messages.text: The line stopped due to problems with the film
The line is running
End of the 1shif
Good afternoon! Second shift batch verified.
Chocolate and cream adjustment, 2nd shift. Brandon Lance Alan Todd Nidia Lopez Corea Paula Pena
Second shift centerlines and shadow board

Good afternoon 2nd shift 


Flow wrap Centerlines
Chocolate report (05/08) Alan Todd, Alex Mendoza, Jeffrey Barney, Nidia Lopez Corea
The weight, texture, appearance, surface, and packaging remain within technical specifications:
The packaging passed the water test:
During the inspection of the box, 760 pieces were counted; no open, empty, or duplicate wrappers were observed.
Line was having some belt issues
Was stopped from 7:55 to 8:10

Ends 2nd shift and starts 3rd shift 


 


Shadow board at the pack area
Line closure adjustment. Brandon Lance Alan Todd Nidia Lopez Corea Paula Pena
Shadow board at off the 3rd shift molding 3
Original one shot pump is staged in the equipment area with its program/locking plates.
Pump W870152 has been installed and have no issues during a dry run.

Thank you Fernando Flores.

Dave Ruff,

Is there a PM currently in place for this vacuum?
Main vacuum for flow wrap was faulting out due to it being very dirty motor is stuck . We will  clean it .
I had asked for one. Let me check
ML3 is happy. Welcome
So very hard stuff
Dakota Adair Conner Boyd the sanitizer sprayers for the equipment have been used on the drains.  We are taking out of service until they are cleared for equipment use.
I've walked the plant, and we don't have any other sprayers for the sanitizer. Is there any chance they were taken to another building??

William Beattie Angelica Perez 
The sprayers should be emptied, nozzles on the sprayers cleaned very good after nozzle passes ATP - the sprayers can be filled with the correct sanitizer for equipment.
I got it!

Jody Howse Brandon Hernandez, Chad Stone

William  Lopez has not been able to confirm the cleaning crew so we will treat it as though they will be here this weekend.  

They will have a team cleaning this same group of vents again 

They  also have a team cleaning all vents above S3 from the front to the curtain.  Please cover all S3 equipment in this area as well as the equipment that you covered last weekend 

Thank you and have a great weekend everyone

Jody Howse, Brandon Hernandez

We didn’t talk about this at shift exchange and wanted to make sure you saw this one about covering S3 from the front to the curtain.
Charity Young Miriah Manzanares
The Enrober drain area has been sprayed with sanitizer to finish the cleaning
The jar filling conveyor still has not passed the allergen test for the Level 4 clean. Jody Howse

We tried to use the steamer in the enrober area for cleaning the drain, there is no proper electrical connection for that machine near the enrober area, maintenance tried to help us but there is no power of the same amperage for that machine. We sanitize and scrub the drains in that area  Curt Willis Miriah Manzanares
The only thing left on the clean is the cute cavanna this was passed on to third shift
A new blower has been installed so there's no more need to use a desk fan
This was right at 9am the team was scheduled to Rotate lunches they are rotating ML4.
As an update, this was caused by a Big Joe with a pallet hitting a breaker panel over by the east restrooms. Damage was reported and a post made in the safety chat.

When maintenance restored the electricity to the MFM, the sensors did not detect that the machine was full of chocolate, so when we returned from lunch, maintenance checked the sensitivity of the sensors and we did a clean and rezero. Currently, the machine is working well
Sensor for group C got knocked out of position so it overfilled, maintenance is on the line, but the EE are separating the colors of the chocolates
The sensor is now back in position and other ones are good as well.
the line is running

Quick reminder team. Level 2 clean means if it’s necessary to disassemble to better clean then we need to disassemble. The only way for a thorough visual inspection to be completed is for these covers to be taken off so QA can complete the inspection for all Z conveyors. Please continue with the process that’s always been used for MFM.
Gracias Angel
Level 2 clean in process
We have stopped for the night. 73 pallets
Level 2 clean completed and passed off ATP
Line is down. Every 10 bars are coming out without lot
Justin Halladay is here working on it
Line is running
Line stop maintenance is going to do a rebooting on FW
Line back up running

One pallet and 8 boxes have been placed on hold because pieces without lot numbers were found. We checked the two previous pallets and no pieces without lot numbers were found. We are doing checks every 15 minutes. Maintenance is checking.
Maintenance made adjustments and no pieces without lot numbers have been found since then. The printer is now working properly.
End of shift
And first shift
Pump is at 20% and the buffer tank is at 37%

Good afternoon 


2 nd shift
Piece Weight Check and packaging. 2nd shift.
Chocolate and cookies adjustment, 2nd shift. Brandon Lance Alan Todd Nidia Lopez Corea Paula Pena
Chocolate report (05/08) Alan Todd, Alex Mendoza, Jeffrey Barney, Nidia Lopez Corea
Buffer tank is at 27% and pump is at 20%
The pump speed was at 20% and the buffer tank is at 16%. I turned the pump speed back up to 30%. I will monitor the buffer tank level.
Water Test: OK  👍
809 pieces were counted in the box, no open pieces or empty wrappers were observed.
Line is down bad print
Maintenance is working on a resolution
Buffer tank is at 32% and the pump is at 20%
Maintenance is still working on the flow wrap/ print problem
Buffer tank is at 42%. I turned the pump speed down to 15% for 30 minutes while the line is being worked on. I will continue to monitor.

To fix the issue of not printing I put the encoder on the film. I believe this film being a sticky as it is caused problems on the stainless roller. Same as what we saw when we ran york a little bit ago. It’s printing consistently for now.

Raymond Fleming could we just set the standard to have the encoder on the film?

Dave Ruff
I don’t see why not. Especially if Preston said that’s how it’s set up at building 3.
Turn the pump back up to 20% now that the line is running again. The buffer tank is at 39%.
Pump is at 20% and the buffer tank is at 32%
Wilson Amaris Cabrera how is the lot code going?
The pump is at 20% and the buffer tank is at 24%
It's going well, two boxes were reworked since the films broke and they started to come out without a lot code!
Thank you, can you let us know every hour how it is going please 🙏
Of course!
A total of 802 pieces were counted in the box, and no empty or open pieces were found during the inspection.
The buffer tank is at 17%. I turned the pump up to 25%. I will continue to monitor.
Team. All pieces have lot cede!!
Parados por problemas con la maquina. No inicia.
Mantenimiento esta trabajando en ella.
The pump speed is at 20% and the buffer tank is at 27%
Maintenance is continuing to work on the flow wrap, tension bar. Line is still down.
Buffer tank is at 50% and the pump speed is at 20%.
Line is still down Alan Todd maintenance has reset the machine a few different times. The tension arm wasn’t working and now they are looking at the forming plate.
Brandon Lance which one is the tension arm?
number 5
This is the fault it’s giving.
Has maintenance reached out to Cy or Justin?
Ray said he called them but nobody has answered or responded.
Has he reached out to Dave Ruff?
Nobody has reached out to me.
Thanks Dave Ruff. Sounds like the line just came back up
Line just started backup Alan Todd
They need to look at PE-B16
Maintenance re-taught the -B4 sensor. That solved the issue.
All pieces have lot code✅
Pump is at 20% and buffer tank is at 60%
Line is down again -B4 sensor
Line is running
All pieces include a lot code ✅

Buffer tank is at 63%. I shut the PTL pump off and have alerted maintenance that they can pull it and clean it when they have time. I let them know it needs to be ready for Monday morning start up Alan Todd
Let’s make sure the PTL pump is pulled and cleaned by Raymond Fleming/Eric Ortega and ready to go for Justin Halladay/Cy Everett to install on Monday morning.
All parts have a batch code.
A total of 803 pieces were counted in the box, and no empty or opened pieces were found during the inspection.
No air leakage during the water test.
2 nd shift finish
3 cajas de scrap

Gisselle Meneses, 

The time locks are not working. Would you be able to help with this?

Jessica Ayala, Stephanie Arnold, Donna Martinez

WIP-21125 York specs have been uploaded to SC. Alan Todd Alex Mendoza

Good morning Team. Today’s plan was to cook one batch of 21117 FEA One Shot while keeping the Sucrotherm water valve closed. The viscosity and water activity tests were within the acceptable ranges. Therefore, according to Volker, we need to inspect the Sucrotherm
What is the Low Water min and max
Can we make sure it’s on the board 😁
It is on the board ☝️
